title: British Everyday Banter
description: Understatement, casual complaint, observational humour, mild self-deprecation, ordinary-life framing.
visual_style: ordinary scene with slightly ridiculous framing

title: Worldwide Ironic Gaming Voice
description: Internet sarcasm, exaggerated reaction language, gamer complaint energy, mock outrage, meme density.
visual_style: reaction image or game screenshot with absurd caption

title: PT-BR Casual Internet Voice
description: Directness, low-formality complaint, 'mano/cara/pô', compressed but legible internet-native Brazilian speech.
visual_style: screenshot, football clip, news screenshot, or absurd daily-life image

title: PT-BR Ironic Memetic Voice
description: Kkkk energy, ironic overstatement, absurdity, sarcasm, reaction-oriented phrase compression.
visual_style: meme image, football reaction, chaotic screenshot

title: PT-BR Reflective Human Voice
description: Reflective Brazilian Portuguese with breathing pauses, understated emotion, and natural narrative cadence without thread energy.
visual_style: road, room, notebook, old photo, quiet atmosphere

title: PT-BR Professional Human Voice
description: Professional Brazilian Portuguese that sounds like a real person, not a corporate brochure. Clear, credible, and lightly conversational.
visual_style: clean workspace, profile card, subtle presentation deck

title: English Reflective Human Voice
description: Reflective English with natural pauses, emotional restraint, and believable narrative pacing rather than polished essay rhythm.
caption_style: quiet reflective line with a natural pause
visual_style: road, room, notebook, old photo, muted atmosphere

title: English Professional Human Voice
description: Professional English that sounds like a real operator, strategist, or marketer rather than a polished corporate bio generator.
visual_style: clean desk, profile page, presentation note

title: British Professional Human Voice
description: Professional UK-flavoured English that sounds capable and clear without slipping into consultancy sludge.
visual_style: clean desk, slide deck, note card, quiet office

title: Casual US Human Voice
description: Current American casual prose that feels like a real note or reply: direct, slightly loose, and human without sliding into deck language or bot polish.
caption_style: plainspoken note or reply with low-friction phrasing
visual_style: notes app, text thread, browser tab
